steps.t: Sioned has asked you to look for her father, a hobbit affectionately known as Ol' Tipsy Gil. Gil can be found around Glyn Helyg.
You found an empty wine bottle, so Tipsy Gil may be close by! Keep searching for him in Glyn Helyg.
You managed to find Gil, but he's too drunk to make it home for dinner. He has asked you to bring him some water to help him sober up. You should fill…
With a full bottle of fresh water in hand, you are ready to help sober up Ol' Tipsy Gil. Gil is in Glyn Helyg.
You should let Sioned know that her father is on the way to recovery and will be around for dinner soon. Sioned is in Glyn Helyg.
